MyCareerLens — Free Career Test for Indian Students (Ages 6–21)

Discover Your Career Direction

A free, research-backed career exploration tool for Indian students aged 6–21. Honest, warm, and designed to travel with you wherever you go.

View Previous Results Short on time? Try the Quick Exploration (10 min, 20 questions)

A simple career exploration tool — not a formal test or professional assessment. A starting point for thinking about career directions; it doesn't predict your future or guarantee outcomes.

How It Works

Four simple steps from your first tap to personalized career directions.

📝
Tell us about yourself
Quick profile: name, age, class (2 minutes)
🧠
Answer fun questions
Activity-based questions across multiple dimensions (15–40 min depending on age)
📊
See your unique profile
Your strengths, interests, personality, and learning style — beautifully visualized
🎯
Explore career directions
Career paths that align with your profile, with roadmaps and action steps
🔬 Built on established research frameworks used by career psychologists worldwide
🔒 Your answers stay on your device — 100% private, works offline after first load
🎁 Free forever — no premium tiers, no ads, no data collection
Step 1 of 3

About the Student

🌟

Welcome!

Results

MyCareerLens is a research-informed career exploration tool. It is not a clinical diagnostic and should not replace professional counseling for major academic decisions. This tool does not provide professional, clinical, or diagnostic evaluation of any kind. No outcomes, results, or career paths suggested by this tool are guaranteed.

Inspired by established academic frameworks: Gardner's Multiple Intelligences (1983), Holland's RIASEC (1959), Big Five Personality Model, learning style preferences (Fleming's VARK model), and Goleman's Emotional Intelligence (1995). This tool is independently developed and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any authors, organizations, or official providers of the referenced academic frameworks.

MyCareerLens respects your privacy fully. Your responses and results never leave your device. On first load, public fonts and chart libraries are fetched from CDN — no personal data is transmitted. After that, the app works offline. There are no ads, no accounts, and no personal data collection. The only thing recorded is anonymous global visit and completion counts — two simple numbers visible to everyone, with no user information attached.

Free forever. No premium. No upsell. Credits: Google Fonts, OpenDyslexic.
